resolution_rules: Consensus of eval_1 and eval_2 with explicit resolution rules for disagreements

basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Inventories-merchandise $100, Cr Cash $100; semantically equivalent.

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Inventory $300, Cr Accounts Payable $300; semantically equivalent.

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $180, Cr Issued capital $100, Cr Share premium $80; semantically equivalent.

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Both evals agree: All amounts and types correct; semantically equivalent.

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Accounts Payable $50, Cr Cash $50; semantically equivalent.

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Both evals agree: Long-term Borrowings semantically equivalent to Notes payable.

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Both evals agree: Bank Loan Payable equivalent to Notes payable, Common Shares equivalent to Share capital-Common.

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Both evals agree: Customer Deposits equivalent to Contract liabilities; amounts match.

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Treasury Shares $200, Cr Cash $200; exact match.

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Resolved: Dividends declared vs Retained earnings are both valid approaches per IFRS for dividend declarations; match accepted per resolution rules.

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Preferred Shares $100, Cr Common Shares $100; semantically equivalent.

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Employee Benefits Expense $100, Cr Cash $100; IFRS equivalent of Salaries expense.

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Utilities Expense $50, Cr Accrued Liabilities $50; exact match.

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Casualty Loss $2,000, Cr Inventory $2,000; semantically equivalent.

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Both evals agree: Empty lines = no entry; expected null.

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Machinery $800K, Cr Trade Payables $700K, Cr Cash $100K; exact match.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Machinery $200K, Cr Cash $200K; exact match.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Resolved: PV rounding ~$100 on $3M bond (under 0.01% of transaction amount); match accepted per rounding tolerance rule.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Warranty Expense $900K, Cr Warranty Provision $900K; exact match.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Resolved: Machinery vs PP&E-Marine structures are distinct accounts per resolution rules; generic Machinery is not an acceptable substitute for the specific marine asset sub-class.

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Issued Capital $50K, Dr Retained Earnings $10K, Cr Cash $60K; correct.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Both evals agree: Transportation expense is synonym for Distribution costs; all five lines and amounts correct.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Prepaid Expenses $1M, Cr Cash $1M; semantically equivalent.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Resolved: PV rounding $235 on $49M (under 0.01% of transaction amount); gross method with discount contra-liability is correct structure; match accepted per rounding tolerance rule.

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Both evals agree: Actual merged two cash credits into single Cash line; expected separates Cash $1,750K and Cash-chequing $2,360K.

int_13_donation_note.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Donations Expense $1M, Cr Notes Payable $1M; exact match.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Motor Vehicles $40K, Cr Cash $20K, Cr Notes Payable $20K; exact match.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $200K, Cr Long-term borrowings $200K; exact match.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $5K, Cr Contract liabilities $5K; Cash encompasses Cash-chequing.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Office equipment $5,500, Dr Motor vehicles $250K, Cr Cash $5,500, Cr Trade payables $250K; exact match.

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Cash $25,500, Cr Revenue $25,500; exact match.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: Both evals agree: Dr R&D Expense $50K, Cr Cash $50K; Cash encompasses Cash-chequing.

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: Both evals agree: All 6 lines match semantically; amounts exact.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Both evals agree: Dr WIP $15K (equivalent to WIP-Manufacturing overhead), Dr Utilities expense $5,500, Cr Credit Card Payable $20,500; correct.

int_24_advertising.reason: Both evals agree: Tax split (HST/ITC extracted separately vs bundled); match=false, tax_relaxed_match=true.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Both evals agree: Dr Land $6M, Dr Building $3M, Dr ITC $300K, Cr Trade Payables $4.5M, Cr Cash $4.8M; correct allocation and amounts.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Resolved: 4 withholding lines vs 1 aggregated is acceptable per granularity rule; gross amounts and debits correct, totals match.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Resolved: 7 debit lines vs 2 simple is acceptable per granularity rule; totals match ($7,750 liability + $6,300 expense = $14,050 cash).
